title: FundingAward
description: A discretionary funding or capital grant award made by the Manhattan Borough President — the office's largest recurring public output. ONE canonical schema reconciling the many parallel, per-fiscal-year Open Data datasets that the office publishes as separate assets: Capital Grant Awards 2014/2015/2016/2017/2018 (9umc-3b2y, 6wee-b7wf, 83z6-smyr, k84j-firu, 66yh-nemi), Tourism Grants (x4ud-jhxu), Manhattan Community Grants – Historical (rsnd-bbih), Manhattan Community Award Program / MCAP (y3ea-en4q), and Police-Community Relations Awards 2016 (w38c-pyzq). The fragmentation into one dataset per year per program is itself a finding — see crosswalk.md.

program.description: Which award program / dataset this row comes from.

projectDescription.description: Project description ('Project Description' / 'Brief Program Description'), where published.

schoolNumber.description: School number for education projects ('School Number'), capital awards only.
